caption: Style: Photorealistic. A scene of a storm-battered lighthouse on black coastal rocks, featuring white surf, slate clouds, spray, and a narrow path along the cliff. The camera moves forward, revealing the foreground terrain and distant horizon. The camera then moves forward while panning right, revealing side landmarks and depth layers. The camera then moves forward while panning left, revealing the opposite side of the environment.

Style: Minecraft. A scene of a blocky cliff village above a square blue ocean, featuring grass cubes, red soil, torch-lit windows, and pixel clouds at sunset. The camera moves forward, revealing the blocky terrain ahead. The camera then moves forward while panning left, revealing the cliff edge and ocean.

Style: Photorealistic. A scene of a pagoda on a green hillside, featuring misty mountains, terraced paths, pine trees, and warm golden-hour light. The camera moves forward, revealing the foreground terrain and distant horizon. The camera then moves forward while panning right, revealing side landmarks and depth layers. The camera then moves forward while panning left, revealing the opposite side of the environment.

Style: Photorealistic. A scene of a quiet bedroom viewed from a dark doorway, featuring arched window light, pale curtains, linen bedding, and a wood floor. The camera moves forward, revealing the main furniture and window light. The camera then panning left, revealing details on the left side of the room. The camera then panning right, revealing objects and surfaces on the right side.

Style: Photorealistic. A scene of a wooden balcony overlooking a lake, featuring glass doors, lounge chairs, railing shadows, twilight water, and distant mountains. The camera then panning right, revealing objects and surfaces on the right side.

Style: Photorealistic. A scene of a moss-covered stone well in a garden, featuring wet stones, autumn leaves, dark water, and soft green background blur. The camera moves forward, revealing the main object texture. The camera then moves right while panning left, revealing the rim, table surface, and surrounding props.

Style: Photorealistic. A scene of an active volcanic crater seen from above, featuring black basalt, red-orange lava cracks, steam, and a violet horizon. The camera moves right while panning left, revealing the broad map-like layout. The camera then moves forward while tilting down, revealing lower terrain details and spatial structure.

Style: 3D Rendering / CGI. A scene of a violet alien desert under two moons, featuring crystal spires, rippled dunes, glowing terrain, and a distant monolith. The camera moves forward, revealing the foreground terrain and distant horizon. The camera then moves forward while panning right, revealing side landmarks and depth layers. The camera then moves forward while panning left, revealing the opposite side of the environment.

The camera moves forward, revealing the vanishing point and floor perspective. The camera then moves forward while panning right, revealing side architecture and lights.
